meaning: adj.亚该亚的,希腊的;n.亚该亚人,希腊人
examples: Since it was born, Rome faced to the threaten by its neighbor Achaean.
The faults related to the gold deposits in the area often follow the contact between granites and metamorphic rocks of the Achaean Jiaodong Group.
In the world-view of Achaean, individual was regards as a duplicate of the idea, and the world of ideas is the foundation and essence of the real world.
